001package react4j.processor;
002
003import com.squareup.javapoet.TypeName;
004import java.io.IOException;
005import java.util.ArrayList;
006import java.util.Arrays;
007import java.util.Collection;
008import java.util.Collections;
009import java.util.Comparator;
010import java.util.HashMap;
011import java.util.HashSet;
012import java.util.List;
013import java.util.Map;
014import java.util.Set;
015import java.util.regex.Matcher;
016import java.util.regex.Pattern;
017import java.util.stream.Collectors;
018import javax.annotation.Nonnull;
019import javax.annotation.Nullable;
020import javax.annotation.processing.RoundEnvironment;
021import javax.annotation.processing.SupportedAnnotationTypes;
022import javax.annotation.processing.SupportedOptions;
023import javax.annotation.processing.SupportedSourceVersion;
024import javax.lang.model.SourceVersion;
025import javax.lang.model.element.AnnotationMirror;
026import javax.lang.model.element.AnnotationValue;
027import javax.lang.model.element.Element;
028import javax.lang.model.element.ElementKind;
029import javax.lang.model.element.ExecutableElement;
030import javax.lang.model.element.Modifier;
031import javax.lang.model.element.TypeElement;
032import javax.lang.model.element.TypeParameterElement;
033import javax.lang.model.element.VariableElement;
034import javax.lang.model.type.ArrayType;
035import javax.lang.model.type.DeclaredType;
036import javax.lang.model.type.ExecutableType;
037import javax.lang.model.type.TypeKind;
038import javax.lang.model.type.TypeMirror;
039import javax.lang.model.type.TypeVariable;
040import javax.lang.model.util.Elements;
041import javax.lang.model.util.Types;
042import javax.tools.Diagnostic;
043import org.realityforge.proton.AbstractStandardProcessor;
044import org.realityforge.proton.AnnotationsUtil;
045import org.realityforge.proton.DeferredElementSet;
046import org.realityforge.proton.ElementsUtil;
047import org.realityforge.proton.MemberChecks;
048import org.realityforge.proton.ProcessorException;
049import org.realityforge.proton.StopWatch;
050
051/**
052 * Annotation processor that analyzes React annotated source and generates models from the annotations.
053 */
054@SuppressWarnings( "Duplicates" )
055@SupportedAnnotationTypes( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME )
056@SupportedSourceVersion( SourceVersion.RELEASE_17 )
057@SupportedOptions( { "react4j.defer.unresolved",
058                     "react4j.defer.errors",
059                     "react4j.debug",
060                     "react4j.profile",
061                     "react4j.verbose_out_of_round.errors" } )
062public final class React4jProcessor
063  extends AbstractStandardProcessor
064{
065  private record ObserveOnRenderConfig(boolean enabled, boolean runtimeCheck)
066  {
067  }
068
069  private static final String SENTINEL_NAME = "<default>";
070  private static final Pattern DEFAULT_GETTER_PATTERN = Pattern.compile( "^get([A-Z].*)Default$" );
071  private static final Pattern VALIDATE_INPUT_PATTERN = Pattern.compile( "^validate([A-Z].*)$" );
072  private static final Pattern LAST_INPUT_PATTERN = Pattern.compile( "^last([A-Z].*)$" );
073  private static final Pattern PREV_INPUT_PATTERN = Pattern.compile( "^prev([A-Z].*)$" );
074  private static final Pattern INPUT_PATTERN = Pattern.compile( "^([a-z].*)$" );
075  private static final Pattern GETTER_PATTERN = Pattern.compile( "^get([A-Z].*)$" );
076  private static final Pattern ISSER_PATTERN = Pattern.compile( "^is([A-Z].*)$" );
077  @Nonnull
078  private final DeferredElementSet _deferredTypes = new DeferredElementSet();
079  @Nonnull
080  private final StopWatch _analyzeViewStopWatch = new StopWatch( "Analyze View" );
081
082  @Override
083  protected void collectStopWatches( @Nonnull final Collection<StopWatch> stopWatches )
084  {
085    stopWatches.add( _analyzeViewStopWatch );
086  }
087
088  @Override
089  public boolean process( @Nonnull final Set<? extends TypeElement> annotations, @Nonnull final RoundEnvironment env )
090  {
091    debugAnnotationProcessingRootElements( env );
092    collectRootTypeNames( env );
093    processTypeElements( annotations,
094                         env,
095                         Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
096                         _deferredTypes,
097                         _analyzeViewStopWatch.getName(),
098                         this::process,
099                         _analyzeViewStopWatch );
100    errorIfProcessingOverAndInvalidTypesDetected( env );
101    clearRootTypeNamesIfProcessingOver( env );
102    return true;
103  }
104
105  @Override
106  @Nonnull
107  protected String getIssueTrackerURL()
108  {
109    return "https://github.com/react4j/react4j/issues";
110  }
111
112  @Nonnull
113  @Override
114  protected String getOptionPrefix()
115  {
116    return "react4j";
117  }
118
119  private void process( @Nonnull final TypeElement element )
120    throws IOException, ProcessorException
121  {
122    final ViewDescriptor descriptor = parse( element );
123    final String packageName = descriptor.getPackageName();
124    emitTypeSpec( packageName, ViewGenerator.buildType( processingEnv, descriptor ) );
125    emitTypeSpec( packageName, BuilderGenerator.buildType( processingEnv, descriptor ) );
126    if ( descriptor.needsInjection() )
127    {
128      emitTypeSpec( packageName, FactoryGenerator.buildType( processingEnv, descriptor ) );
129    }
130  }
131
132  /**
133   * Return true if there is any method annotated with @PostConstruct.
134   */
135  private boolean hasPostConstruct( @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
136  {
137    return
138      methods.stream().anyMatch( e -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( e, Constants.POST_CONSTRUCT_CLASSNAME ) );
139  }
140
141  @Nonnull
142  private ViewDescriptor parse( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement )
143  {
144    final String name = deriveViewName( typeElement );
145    final ViewType type = extractViewType( typeElement );
146    final List<ExecutableElement> methods =
147      ElementsUtil.getMethods( typeElement, processingEnv.getElementUtils(), processingEnv.getTypeUtils() );
148
149    final boolean hasPostConstruct = hasPostConstruct( methods );
150    final boolean shouldSetDefaultPriority = shouldSetDefaultPriority( methods );
151
152    MemberChecks.mustNotBeFinal( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME, typeElement );
153    MemberChecks.mustBeAbstract( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME, typeElement );
154    if ( ElementKind.CLASS != typeElement.getKind() )
155    {
156      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME, "be a class" ),
157                                    typeElement );
158    }
159    else if ( ElementsUtil.isNonStaticNestedClass( typeElement ) )
160    {
161      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME ) +
162                                    " target must not be a non-static nested class",
163                                    typeElement );
164    }
165    final List<ExecutableElement> constructors = ElementsUtil.getConstructors( typeElement );
166    if ( 1 != constructors.size() || !isConstructorValid( constructors.get( 0 ) ) )
167    {
168      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
169                                                       "have a single, package-access constructor or the default constructor" ),
170                                    typeElement );
171    }
172    final ExecutableElement constructor = constructors.get( 0 );
173
174    final boolean sting = deriveSting( typeElement, constructor );
175    final boolean notSyntheticConstructor =
176      Elements.Origin.EXPLICIT == processingEnv.getElementUtils().getOrigin( constructor );
177
178    final List<VariableElement> injectableParameters = getInjectableConstructorParameters( constructor );
179    if ( sting )
180    {
181      if ( injectableParameters.isEmpty() )
182      {
183        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
184                                                            "have specified sting=ENABLED if the constructor has no parameters" ),
185                                      typeElement );
186      }
187    }
188    else
189    {
190      final boolean hasNamedAnnotation =
191        injectableParameters.stream()
192          .anyMatch( p -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( p, Constants.STING_NAMED_CLASSNAME ) );
193      if ( hasNamedAnnotation )
194      {
195        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
196                                                            "have specified sting=DISABLED and have a constructor parameter annotated with the " +
197                                                            Constants.STING_NAMED_CLASSNAME + " annotation" ),
198                                      constructor );
199      }
200    }
201
202    final ViewDescriptor descriptor =
203      new ViewDescriptor( name,
204                          typeElement,
205                          constructor,
206                          type,
207                          sting,
208                          notSyntheticConstructor,
209                          hasPostConstruct,
210                          shouldSetDefaultPriority );
211
212    for ( final Element element : descriptor.getElement().getEnclosedElements() )
213    {
214      if ( ElementKind.METHOD == element.getKind() )
215      {
216        final ExecutableElement method = (ExecutableElement) element;
217        if ( method.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.PUBLIC ) &&
218             MemberChecks.doesMethodNotOverrideInterfaceMethod( processingEnv, typeElement, method ) &&
219             ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( method,
220                                                  Constants.WARNING_PUBLIC_METHOD,
221                                                  Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) )
222        {
223          final String message =
224            MemberChecks.shouldNot( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
225                                    "declare a public method. " +
226                                    MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_PUBLIC_METHOD,
227                                                               Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) );
228          processingEnv.getMessager().printMessage( Diagnostic.Kind.WARNING, message, method );
229        }
230        if ( method.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.FINAL ) &&
231             ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( method,
232                                                  Constants.WARNING_FINAL_METHOD,
233                                                  Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) )
234        {
235          final String message =
236            MemberChecks.shouldNot( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
237                                    "declare a final method. " +
238                                    MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_FINAL_METHOD,
239                                                               Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) );
240          processingEnv.getMessager().printMessage( Diagnostic.Kind.WARNING, message, method );
241        }
242        if ( method.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.PROTECTED ) &&
243             ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( method,
244                                                  Constants.WARNING_PROTECTED_METHOD,
245                                                  Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) &&
246             !isMethodAProtectedOverride( typeElement, method ) )
247        {
248          final String message =
249            MemberChecks.shouldNot( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
250                                    "declare a protected method. " +
251                                    MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_PROTECTED_METHOD,
252                                                               Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) );
253          processingEnv.getMessager().printMessage( Diagnostic.Kind.WARNING, message, method );
254        }
255      }
256    }
257
258    determineViewCapabilities( descriptor, typeElement );
259    determineInputs( descriptor, methods );
260    determineInputValidatesMethods( descriptor, methods );
261    determineOnInputChangeMethods( descriptor, methods );
262    determineDefaultInputsMethods( descriptor, methods );
263    determineDefaultInputsFields( descriptor );
264    determinePreUpdateMethod( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
265    determinePostMountOrUpdateMethod( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
266    determinePostUpdateMethod( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
267    determinePostMountMethod( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
268    determineOnErrorMethod( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
269    determineScheduleRenderMethods( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
270    determinePublishMethods( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
271    determinePreRenderMethods( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
272    determinePostRenderMethods( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
273    determineRenderMethod( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
274
275    for ( final InputDescriptor input : descriptor.getInputs() )
276    {
277      if ( !isInputRequired( input ) )
278      {
279        input.markAsOptional();
280      }
281      else
282      {
283        if ( input.isContextSource() )
284        {
285          throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME,
286                                                              "specify require=ENABLE parameter when the for source=CONTEXT parameter is specified" ),
287                                        input.getElement() );
288        }
289      }
290    }
291
292    /*
293     * Sorting must occur after @InputDefault has been processed to ensure the sorting
294     * correctly sorts optional inputs after required inputs.
295     */
296    descriptor.sortInputs();
297
298    verifyInputsNotAnnotatedWithArezAnnotations( descriptor );
299    verifyInputsNotCollectionOfArezComponents( descriptor );
300
301    return descriptor;
302  }
303
304  private boolean isMethodAProtectedOverride( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
305                                              @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method )
306  {
307    final ExecutableElement overriddenMethod = ElementsUtil.getOverriddenMethod( processingEnv, typeElement, method );
308    return null != overriddenMethod && overriddenMethod.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.PROTECTED );
309  }
310
311  private boolean deriveSting( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement, final @Nonnull ExecutableElement constructor )
312  {
313    final String inject =
314      AnnotationsUtil.getEnumAnnotationParameter( typeElement,
315                                                  Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
316                                                  "sting" );
317    if ( "ENABLE".equals( inject ) )
318    {
319      return true;
320    }
321    else if ( "DISABLE".equals( inject ) )
322    {
323      return false;
324    }
325    else
326    {
327      return !getInjectableConstructorParameters( constructor ).isEmpty() &&
328             null != processingEnv.getElementUtils().getTypeElement( Constants.STING_INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME );
329    }
330  }
331
332  @Nonnull
333  private List<VariableElement> getInjectableConstructorParameters( @Nonnull final ExecutableElement constructor )
334  {
335    return constructor.getParameters().stream()
336      .map( parameter -> (VariableElement) parameter )
337      .filter( parameter -> !isInputParameter( parameter ) )
338      .toList();
339  }
340
341  private boolean isInputParameter( @Nonnull final VariableElement parameter )
342  {
343    return AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( parameter, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME );
344  }
345
346  private boolean isConstructorValid( @Nonnull final ExecutableElement ctor )
347  {
348    if ( Elements.Origin.EXPLICIT != processingEnv.getElementUtils().getOrigin( ctor ) )
349    {
350      return true;
351    }
352    else
353    {
354      final Set<Modifier> modifiers = ctor.getModifiers();
355      return
356        !modifiers.contains( Modifier.PRIVATE ) &&
357        !modifiers.contains( Modifier.PUBLIC ) &&
358        !modifiers.contains( Modifier.PROTECTED );
359    }
360  }
361
362  private void verifyInputsNotCollectionOfArezComponents( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor )
363  {
364    for ( final InputDescriptor input : descriptor.getInputs() )
365    {
366      final Element element = input.getElement();
367      final TypeMirror returnType = input.getType();
368      if ( TypeKind.DECLARED == returnType.getKind() )
369      {
370        final DeclaredType declaredType = (DeclaredType) returnType;
371        final List<? extends TypeMirror> typeArguments = declaredType.getTypeArguments();
372        if ( isCollection( declaredType ) )
373        {
374          if ( 1 == typeArguments.size() && isArezComponent( typeArguments.get( 0 ) ) )
375          {
376            throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target is a collection that contains Arez components. " +
377                                          "This is not a safe pattern when the arez components can be disposed.",
378                                          element );
379          }
380        }
381        else if ( isMap( declaredType ) )
382        {
383          if ( 2 == typeArguments.size() &&
384               ( isArezComponent( typeArguments.get( 0 ) ) ||
385                 isArezComponent( typeArguments.get( 1 ) ) ) )
386          {
387            throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target is a collection that contains Arez components. " +
388                                          "This is not a safe pattern when the arez components can be disposed.",
389                                          element );
390          }
391        }
392      }
393      else if ( TypeKind.ARRAY == returnType.getKind() )
394      {
395        final ArrayType arrayType = (ArrayType) returnType;
396        if ( isArezComponent( arrayType.getComponentType() ) )
397        {
398          throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target is an array that contains Arez components. " +
399                                        "This is not a safe pattern when the arez components can be disposed.",
400                                        element );
401        }
402      }
403    }
404  }
405
406  private boolean isCollection( @Nonnull final DeclaredType declaredType )
407  {
408    final TypeElement returnType = (TypeElement) processingEnv.getTypeUtils().asElement( declaredType );
409    final String classname = returnType.getQualifiedName().toString();
410    /*
411     * For the time being lets just list out a bunch of collections. We can ge more specific when/if
412     * it is ever required
413     */
414    return Collection.class.getName().equals( classname ) ||
415           Set.class.getName().equals( classname ) ||
416           List.class.getName().equals( classname ) ||
417           HashSet.class.getName().equals( classname ) ||
418           ArrayList.class.getName().equals( classname );
419  }
420
421  private boolean isMap( @Nonnull final DeclaredType declaredType )
422  {
423    final TypeElement returnType = (TypeElement) processingEnv.getTypeUtils().asElement( declaredType );
424    final String classname = returnType.getQualifiedName().toString();
425    /*
426     * For the time being lets just list out a bunch of collections. We can ge more specific when/if
427     * it is ever required
428     */
429    return Map.class.getName().equals( classname ) || HashMap.class.getName().equals( classname );
430  }
431
432  private boolean isArezComponent( @Nonnull final TypeMirror typeMirror )
433  {
434    return typeMirror instanceof DeclaredType &&
435           processingEnv.getTypeUtils()
436             .asElement( typeMirror )
437             .getAnnotationMirrors()
438             .stream()
439             .anyMatch( a -> a.getAnnotationType().toString().equals( Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME ) );
440  }
441
442  private void verifyInputsNotAnnotatedWithArezAnnotations( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor )
443  {
444    for ( final InputDescriptor input : descriptor.getInputs() )
445    {
446      final Element element = input.getElement();
447      for ( final AnnotationMirror mirror : element.getAnnotationMirrors() )
448      {
449        final String classname = mirror.getAnnotationType().toString();
450        if ( classname.startsWith( "arez.annotations." ) )
451        {
452          throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target must not be annotated with any arez annotations but " +
453                                        "is annotated by '" + classname + "'.", element );
454        }
455      }
456    }
457  }
458
459  private void determineOnInputChangeMethods( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
460                                              @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
461  {
462    final List<ExecutableElement> onInputChangeMethods =
463      methods
464        .stream()
465        .filter( m -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( m, Constants.ON_INPUT_CHANGE_CLASSNAME ) )
466        .toList();
467
468    final ArrayList<OnInputChangeDescriptor> onInputChangeDescriptors = new ArrayList<>();
469    for ( final ExecutableElement method : onInputChangeMethods )
470    {
471      final VariableElement phase = (VariableElement)
472        AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( method, Constants.ON_INPUT_CHANGE_CLASSNAME, "phase" ).getValue();
473      final boolean preUpdate = phase.getSimpleName().toString().equals( "PRE" );
474
475      final List<? extends VariableElement> parameters = method.getParameters();
476      final ExecutableType methodType = resolveMethodType( descriptor, method );
477      final List<? extends TypeMirror> parameterTypes = methodType.getParameterTypes();
478
479      MemberChecks.mustBeSubclassCallable( descriptor.getElement(),
480                                           Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
481                                           Constants.ON_INPUT_CHANGE_CLASSNAME,
482                                           method );
483      MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.ON_INPUT_CHANGE_CLASSNAME, method );
484      MemberChecks.mustNotReturnAnyValue( Constants.ON_INPUT_CHANGE_CLASSNAME, method );
485
486      final int parameterCount = parameters.size();
487      if ( 0 == parameterCount )
488      {
489        throw new ProcessorException( "@OnInputChange target must have at least 1 parameter.", method );
490      }
491      final List<InputDescriptor> inputDescriptors = new ArrayList<>( parameterCount );
492      for ( int i = 0; i < parameterCount; i++ )
493      {
494        final VariableElement parameter = parameters.get( i );
495        final String name = deriveOnInputChangeName( parameter );
496        final InputDescriptor input = descriptor.findInputNamed( name );
497        if ( null == input )
498        {
499          throw new ProcessorException( "@OnInputChange target has a parameter named '" +
500                                        parameter.getSimpleName() + "' and the parameter is associated with a " +
501                                        "@Input named '" + name + "' but there is no corresponding @Input " +
502                                        "annotated method.", parameter );
503        }
504        final Types typeUtils = processingEnv.getTypeUtils();
505        if ( !typeUtils.isAssignable( parameterTypes.get( i ), input.getType() ) )
506        {
507          throw new ProcessorException( "@OnInputChange target has a parameter named '" +
508                                        parameter.getSimpleName() + "' and the parameter type is not " +
509                                        "assignable to the return type of the associated @Input annotated method.",
510                                        method );
511        }
512        final boolean mismatchedNullability =
513          (
514            AnnotationsUtil.hasNonnullAnnotation( parameter ) &&
515            AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( input.getElement() )
516          ) ||
517          (
518            AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( parameter ) &&
519            input.isNonNull() );
520
521        if ( mismatchedNullability )
522        {
523          throw new ProcessorException( "@OnInputChange target has a parameter named '" +
524                                        parameter.getSimpleName() + "' that has a nullability annotation " +
525                                        "incompatible with the associated @Input method named " +
526                                        method.getSimpleName(), method );
527        }
528        if ( input.isImmutable() )
529        {
530          throw new ProcessorException( "@OnInputChange target has a parameter named '" +
531                                        parameter.getSimpleName() + "' that is associated with a @Input " +
532                                        "annotated method and the input is specified as immutable.", method );
533        }
534        inputDescriptors.add( input );
535      }
536      onInputChangeDescriptors.add( new OnInputChangeDescriptor( method, inputDescriptors, preUpdate ) );
537    }
538    descriptor.setOnInputChangeDescriptors( onInputChangeDescriptors );
539  }
540
541  @Nonnull
542  private String deriveOnInputChangeName( @Nonnull final VariableElement parameter )
543  {
544    final AnnotationValue value =
545      AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationValue( parameter, Constants.INPUT_REF_CLASSNAME, "value" );
546
547    if ( null != value )
548    {
549      return (String) value.getValue();
550    }
551    else
552    {
553      final String parameterName = parameter.getSimpleName().toString();
554      if ( LAST_INPUT_PATTERN.matcher( parameterName ).matches() ||
555           PREV_INPUT_PATTERN.matcher( parameterName ).matches() )
556      {
557        return Character.toLowerCase( parameterName.charAt( 4 ) ) + parameterName.substring( 5 );
558      }
559      else if ( INPUT_PATTERN.matcher( parameterName ).matches() )
560      {
561        return parameterName;
562      }
563      else
564      {
565        throw new ProcessorException( "@OnInputChange target has a parameter named '" + parameterName +
566                                      "' is not explicitly associated with a input using @InputRef nor does it " +
567                                      "follow required naming conventions 'prev[MyInput]', 'last[MyInput]' or " +
568                                      "'[myInput]'.", parameter );
569      }
570    }
571  }
572
573  private void determineInputValidatesMethods( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
574                                               @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
575  {
576    final List<ExecutableElement> inputValidateMethods =
577      methods
578        .stream()
579        .filter( m -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( m, Constants.INPUT_VALIDATE_CLASSNAME ) )
580        .toList();
581
582    for ( final ExecutableElement method : inputValidateMethods )
583    {
584      final String name = deriveInputValidateName( method );
585      final InputDescriptor input = descriptor.findInputNamed( name );
586      if ( null == input )
587      {
588        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputValidate target for input named '" + name + "' has no corresponding " +
589                                      "@Input annotated method.", method );
590      }
591      if ( 1 != method.getParameters().size() )
592      {
593        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputValidate target must have exactly 1 parameter", method );
594      }
595      final ExecutableType methodType = resolveMethodType( descriptor, method );
596      if ( !processingEnv.getTypeUtils().isAssignable( methodType.getParameterTypes().get( 0 ), input.getType() ) )
597      {
598        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputValidate target has a parameter type that is not assignable to the " +
599                                      "return type of the associated @Input annotated method.", method );
600      }
601      MemberChecks.mustBeSubclassCallable( descriptor.getElement(),
602                                           Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
603                                           Constants.INPUT_VALIDATE_CLASSNAME,
604                                           method );
605      MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.INPUT_VALIDATE_CLASSNAME, method );
606      MemberChecks.mustNotReturnAnyValue( Constants.INPUT_VALIDATE_CLASSNAME, method );
607
608      final VariableElement param = method.getParameters().get( 0 );
609      final boolean mismatchedNullability =
610        (
611          AnnotationsUtil.hasNonnullAnnotation( param ) &&
612          AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( input.getElement() )
613        ) ||
614        (
615          AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( param ) &&
616          input.isNonNull() );
617
618      if ( mismatchedNullability )
619      {
620        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputValidate target has a parameter that has a nullability annotation " +
621                                      "incompatible with the associated @Input method named " +
622                                      input.getElement().getSimpleName(), method );
623      }
624      input.setValidateMethod( method );
625    }
626  }
627
628  @Nonnull
629  private String deriveInputValidateName( @Nonnull final Element element )
630    throws ProcessorException
631  {
632    final String name =
633      (String) AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.INPUT_VALIDATE_CLASSNAME, "name" )
634        .getValue();
635
636    if ( isSentinelName( name ) )
637    {
638      final String deriveName = deriveName( element, VALIDATE_INPUT_PATTERN, name );
639      if ( null == deriveName )
640      {
641        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputValidate target has not specified name nor is it named according " +
642                                      "to the convention 'validate[Name]Input'.", element );
643      }
644      return deriveName;
645    }
646    else
647    {
648      if ( !SourceVersion.isIdentifier( name ) )
649      {
650        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputValidate target specified an invalid name '" + name + "'. The " +
651                                      "name must be a valid java identifier.", element );
652      }
653      else if ( SourceVersion.isKeyword( name ) )
654      {
655        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputValidate target specified an invalid name '" + name + "'. The " +
656                                      "name must not be a java keyword.", element );
657      }
658      return name;
659    }
660  }
661
662  private void determineDefaultInputsMethods( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
663                                              @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
664  {
665    final List<ExecutableElement> defaultInputsMethods =
666      methods
667        .stream()
668        .filter( m -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( m, Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME ) )
669        .toList();
670
671    for ( final ExecutableElement method : defaultInputsMethods )
672    {
673      final String name = deriveInputDefaultName( method );
674      final InputDescriptor input = descriptor.findInputNamed( name );
675      if ( null == input )
676      {
677        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputDefault target for input named '" + name + "' has no corresponding " +
678                                      "@Input annotated method.", method );
679      }
680      final ExecutableType methodType = resolveMethodType( descriptor, method );
681      if ( !processingEnv.getTypeUtils().isAssignable( methodType.getReturnType(), input.getType() ) )
682      {
683        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputDefault target has a return type that is not assignable to the " +
684                                      "return type of the associated @Input annotated method.", method );
685      }
686      MemberChecks.mustBeStaticallySubclassCallable( descriptor.getElement(),
687                                                     Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
688                                                     Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME,
689                                                     method );
690      MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyParameters( Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME, method );
691      MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME, method );
692      MemberChecks.mustReturnAValue( Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME, method );
693
694      input.setDefaultMethod( method );
695    }
696  }
697
698  private void determineDefaultInputsFields( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor )
699  {
700    final List<VariableElement> defaultInputsFields =
701      ElementsUtil.getFields( descriptor.getElement() ).stream()
702        .filter( m -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( m, Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME ) )
703        .toList();
704
705    for ( final VariableElement field : defaultInputsFields )
706    {
707      final String name = deriveInputDefaultName( field );
708      final InputDescriptor input = descriptor.findInputNamed( name );
709      if ( null == input )
710      {
711        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputDefault target for input named '" + name + "' has no corresponding " +
712                                      "@Input annotated method.", field );
713      }
714      if ( !processingEnv.getTypeUtils().isAssignable( field.asType(), input.getType() ) )
715      {
716        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputDefault target has a type that is not assignable to the " +
717                                      "return type of the associated @Input annotated method.", field );
718      }
719      MemberChecks.mustBeStaticallySubclassCallable( descriptor.getElement(),
720                                                     Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
721                                                     Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME,
722                                                     field );
723      MemberChecks.mustBeFinal( Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME, field );
724      input.setDefaultField( field );
725    }
726  }
727
728  @Nonnull
729  private String deriveInputDefaultName( @Nonnull final Element element )
730    throws ProcessorException
731  {
732    final String name =
733      (String) AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME, "name" )
734        .getValue();
735
736    if ( isSentinelName( name ) )
737    {
738      if ( element instanceof ExecutableElement )
739      {
740        final String deriveName = deriveName( element, DEFAULT_GETTER_PATTERN, name );
741        if ( null == deriveName )
742        {
743          throw new ProcessorException( "@InputDefault target has not specified name nor is it named according " +
744                                        "to the convention 'get[Name]Default'.", element );
745        }
746        return deriveName;
747      }
748      else
749      {
750        final String fieldName = element.getSimpleName().toString();
751        boolean matched = true;
752        final int lengthPrefix = "DEFAULT_".length();
753        final int length = fieldName.length();
754        if ( fieldName.startsWith( "DEFAULT_" ) && length > lengthPrefix )
755        {
756          for ( int i = lengthPrefix; i < length; i++ )
757          {
758            final char ch = fieldName.charAt( i );
759            if ( Character.isLowerCase( ch ) ||
760                 (
761                   ( i != lengthPrefix || !Character.isJavaIdentifierStart( ch ) ) &&
762                   ( i == lengthPrefix || !Character.isJavaIdentifierPart( ch ) )
763                 ) )
764            {
765              matched = false;
766              break;
767            }
768          }
769        }
770        else
771        {
772          matched = false;
773        }
774        if ( matched )
775        {
776          return uppercaseConstantToPascalCase( fieldName.substring( lengthPrefix ) );
777        }
778        else
779        {
780          throw new ProcessorException( "@InputDefault target has not specified name nor is it named according " +
781                                        "to the convention 'DEFAULT_[NAME]'.", element );
782        }
783      }
784    }
785    else
786    {
787      if ( !SourceVersion.isIdentifier( name ) )
788      {
789        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputDefault target specified an invalid name '" + name + "'. The " +
790                                      "name must be a valid java identifier.", element );
791      }
792      else if ( SourceVersion.isKeyword( name ) )
793      {
794        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputDefault target specified an invalid name '" + name + "'. The " +
795                                      "name must not be a java keyword.", element );
796      }
797      return name;
798    }
799  }
800
801  @Nonnull
802  private String uppercaseConstantToPascalCase( @Nonnull final String candidate )
803  {
804    final String s = candidate.toLowerCase();
805    final StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
806    boolean uppercase = false;
807    for ( int i = 0; i < s.length(); i++ )
808    {
809      final char ch = s.charAt( i );
810      if ( '_' == ch )
811      {
812        uppercase = true;
813      }
814      else if ( uppercase )
815      {
816        sb.append( Character.toUpperCase( ch ) );
817        uppercase = false;
818      }
819      else
820      {
821        sb.append( ch );
822      }
823    }
824    return sb.toString();
825  }
826
827  private void determineInputs( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
828                                @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
829  {
830    final List<InputDescriptor> inputs = new ArrayList<>();
831    methods
832      .stream()
833      .filter( m -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( m, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME ) )
834      .map( m -> createMethodInputDescriptor( descriptor, methods, m ) )
835      .forEach( input -> addInputDescriptor( inputs, input ) );
836    descriptor.getConstructor().getParameters()
837      .stream()
838      .filter( this::isInputParameter )
839      .map( p -> createConstructorInputDescriptor( descriptor, methods, p ) )
840      .forEach( input -> addInputDescriptor( inputs, input ) );
841
842    final InputDescriptor childrenInput =
843      inputs.stream().filter( p -> p.getName().equals( "children" ) ).findAny().orElse( null );
844    final InputDescriptor childInput =
845      inputs.stream().filter( p -> p.getName().equals( "child" ) ).findAny().orElse( null );
846    if ( null != childrenInput && null != childInput )
847    {
848      throw new ProcessorException( "Multiple candidate children @Input annotated methods: " +
849                                    childrenInput.getElement().getSimpleName() + " and " +
850                                    childInput.getElement().getSimpleName(),
851                                    childrenInput.getElement() );
852    }
853
854    descriptor.setInputs( inputs );
855  }
856
857  private void addInputDescriptor( @Nonnull final List<InputDescriptor> inputs, @Nonnull final InputDescriptor input )
858  {
859    final InputDescriptor existing = inputs.stream().filter( p -> p.getName().equals( input.getName() ) ).findAny().orElse( null );
860    if ( null != existing )
861    {
862      throw new ProcessorException( "Multiple @Input declarations for input named '" + input.getName() +
863                                    "': " + existing.getElement().getSimpleName() + " and " +
864                                    input.getElement().getSimpleName(),
865                                    input.getElement() );
866    }
867    inputs.add( input );
868  }
869
870  private boolean isInputRequired( @Nonnull final InputDescriptor input )
871  {
872    final String requiredValue = input.getRequiredValue();
873    if ( "ENABLE".equals( requiredValue ) )
874    {
875      return true;
876    }
877    else if ( "DISABLE".equals( requiredValue ) )
878    {
879      return false;
880    }
881    else if ( input.isContextSource() )
882    {
883      return false;
884    }
885    else
886    {
887      return !input.hasDefaultMethod() &&
888             !input.hasDefaultField() &&
889             !AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( input.getElement() );
890    }
891  }
892
893  @Nonnull
894  private InputDescriptor createMethodInputDescriptor( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
895                                                       @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods,
896                                                       @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method )
897  {
898    final String name = deriveInputName( method );
899    final ExecutableType methodType = resolveMethodType( descriptor, method );
900
901    verifyNoDuplicateAnnotations( method );
902    MemberChecks.mustBeAbstract( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, method );
903    MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyParameters( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, method );
904    MemberChecks.mustReturnAValue( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, method );
905    MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, method );
906    MemberChecks.mustNotBePackageAccessInDifferentPackage( descriptor.getElement(),
907                                                           Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
908                                                           Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME,
909                                                           method );
910    final TypeMirror returnType = method.getReturnType();
911    if ( !returnType.getKind().isPrimitive() &&
912         !AnnotationsUtil.hasNonnullAnnotation( method ) &&
913         !AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( method ) &&
914         ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( method,
915                                              Constants.WARNING_MISSING_INPUT_NULLABILITY,
916                                              Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) )
917    {
918      final String message =
919        MemberChecks.shouldNot( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME,
920                                "return a non-primitive type without a @Nonnull or @Nullable annotation. " +
921                                MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_MISSING_INPUT_NULLABILITY,
922                                                           Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) );
923      processingEnv.getMessager().printMessage( Diagnostic.Kind.WARNING, message, method );
924    }
925    validateInputNameAndType( name, returnType, method );
926
927    if ( returnType instanceof final TypeVariable typeVariable )
928    {
929      final String typeVariableName = typeVariable.asElement().getSimpleName().toString();
930      List<? extends TypeParameterElement> typeParameters = method.getTypeParameters();
931      if ( typeParameters.stream().anyMatch( p -> p.getSimpleName().toString().equals( typeVariableName ) ) )
932      {
933        throw new ProcessorException( "@Input named '" + name + "' is has a type variable as a return type " +
934                                      "that is declared on the method.", method );
935      }
936    }
937    final String qualifier = (String) AnnotationsUtil
938      .getAnnotationValue( method, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "qualifier" ).getValue();
939    final boolean contextInput = isContextInput( method );
940    final Element inputType = processingEnv.getTypeUtils().asElement( returnType );
941    final boolean immutable = isInputImmutable( method );
942    if ( immutable &&
943         ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( method,
944                                              Constants.WARNING_METHOD_BASED_IMMUTABLE_INPUT,
945                                              Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) )
946    {
947      final String message =
948        MemberChecks.shouldNot( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME,
949                                "specify immutable=true on a method. Method-based immutable inputs are deprecated " +
950                                "and constructor parameters should be used instead. " +
951                                MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_METHOD_BASED_IMMUTABLE_INPUT,
952                                                           Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) );
953      processingEnv.getMessager().printMessage( Diagnostic.Kind.WARNING, message, method );
954    }
955    final boolean observable = isInputObservable( methods, method, immutable );
956    final boolean disposable = null != inputType && isInputDisposable( method, inputType );
957    final ObserveOnRenderConfig observeOnRender = resolveObserveOnRender( method, returnType, inputType );
958    final TypeName typeName = TypeName.get( returnType );
959    if ( typeName.isBoxedPrimitive() && AnnotationsUtil.hasNonnullAnnotation( method ) )
960    {
961      throw new ProcessorException( "@Input named '" + name + "' is a boxed primitive annotated with a " +
962                                    "@Nonnull annotation. The return type should be the primitive type.",
963                                    method );
964    }
965    final ImmutableInputKeyStrategy strategy = immutable ? getImmutableInputKeyStrategy( typeName, inputType ) : null;
966    if ( !"".equals( qualifier ) && !contextInput )
967    {
968      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME,
969                                                          "specify qualifier parameter unless source=CONTEXT is also specified" ),
970                                    method );
971    }
972    final String requiredValue =
973      ( (VariableElement) AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( method, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "require" )
974        .getValue() )
975        .getSimpleName().toString();
976
977    final boolean dependency = isInputDependency( method, immutable, disposable );
978
979    final InputDescriptor inputDescriptor =
980      new InputDescriptor( descriptor,
981                           InputDescriptor.Origin.METHOD,
982                           name,
983                           qualifier,
984                           method,
985                           returnType,
986                           method,
987                           methodType,
988                           null,
989                           inputType,
990                           contextInput,
991                           !immutable,
992                           observable,
993                           disposable,
994                           dependency,
995                           observeOnRender.enabled(),
996                           observeOnRender.runtimeCheck(),
997                           strategy,
998                           requiredValue );
999    if ( inputDescriptor.mayNeedMutableInputAccessedInPostConstructInvariant() )
1000    {
1001      if ( ElementsUtil.isWarningSuppressed( method,
1002                                             Constants.WARNING_MUTABLE_INPUT_ACCESSED_IN_POST_CONSTRUCT,
1003                                             Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) )
1004      {
1005        inputDescriptor.suppressMutableInputAccessedInPostConstruct();
1006      }
1007    }
1008    return inputDescriptor;
1009  }
1010
1011  @Nonnull
1012  private InputDescriptor createConstructorInputDescriptor( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1013                                                            @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods,
1014                                                            @Nonnull final VariableElement parameter )
1015  {
1016    final String name = deriveInputName( parameter );
1017    final TypeMirror type = parameter.asType();
1018    final boolean immutable = isInputImmutable( parameter );
1019    if ( !immutable )
1020    {
1021      throw new ProcessorException( "@Input constructor parameter must specify immutable=true", parameter );
1022    }
1023    if ( !type.getKind().isPrimitive() &&
1024         !AnnotationsUtil.hasNonnullAnnotation( parameter ) &&
1025         !AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( parameter ) &&
1026         ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( parameter,
1027                                              Constants.WARNING_MISSING_INPUT_NULLABILITY,
1028                                              Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) )
1029    {
1030      final String message =
1031        MemberChecks.shouldNot( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME,
1032                                "return a non-primitive type without a @Nonnull or @Nullable annotation. " +
1033                                MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_MISSING_INPUT_NULLABILITY,
1034                                                           Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) );
1035      processingEnv.getMessager().printMessage( Diagnostic.Kind.WARNING, message, parameter );
1036    }
1037    validateInputNameAndType( name, type, parameter );
1038
1039    final String qualifier = (String) AnnotationsUtil
1040      .getAnnotationValue( parameter, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "qualifier" ).getValue();
1041    final boolean contextInput = isContextInput( parameter );
1042    final Element inputType = processingEnv.getTypeUtils().asElement( type );
1043    isInputObservable( methods, parameter, immutable );
1044    final boolean observable = false;
1045    final boolean disposable = null != inputType && isInputDisposable( parameter, inputType );
1046    final ObserveOnRenderConfig observeOnRender = resolveObserveOnRender( parameter, type, inputType );
1047    final TypeName typeName = TypeName.get( type );
1048    if ( typeName.isBoxedPrimitive() && AnnotationsUtil.hasNonnullAnnotation( parameter ) )
1049    {
1050      throw new ProcessorException( "@Input named '" + name + "' is a boxed primitive annotated with a " +
1051                                    "@Nonnull annotation. The return type should be the primitive type.",
1052                                    parameter );
1053    }
1054    final ImmutableInputKeyStrategy strategy = getImmutableInputKeyStrategy( typeName, inputType );
1055    if ( !"".equals( qualifier ) && !contextInput )
1056    {
1057      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME,
1058                                                          "specify qualifier parameter unless source=CONTEXT is also specified" ),
1059                                    parameter );
1060    }
1061    final String requiredValue =
1062      ( (VariableElement) AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( parameter, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "require" )
1063        .getValue() )
1064        .getSimpleName().toString();
1065    final boolean dependency = isInputDependency( parameter, true, disposable );
1066
1067    return new InputDescriptor( descriptor,
1068                                InputDescriptor.Origin.CONSTRUCTOR_PARAMETER,
1069                                name,
1070                                qualifier,
1071                                parameter,
1072                                type,
1073                                null,
1074                                null,
1075                                parameter,
1076                                inputType,
1077                                contextInput,
1078                                false,
1079                                observable,
1080                                disposable,
1081                                dependency,
1082                                observeOnRender.enabled(),
1083                                observeOnRender.runtimeCheck(),
1084                                strategy,
1085                                requiredValue );
1086  }
1087
1088  @Nonnull
1089  private ImmutableInputKeyStrategy getImmutableInputKeyStrategy( @Nonnull final TypeName typeName,
1090                                                                  @Nullable final Element element )
1091  {
1092    if ( typeName.toString().equals( "java.lang.String" ) )
1093    {
1094      return ImmutableInputKeyStrategy.IS_STRING;
1095    }
1096    else if ( typeName.isBoxedPrimitive() || typeName.isPrimitive() )
1097    {
1098      return ImmutableInputKeyStrategy.TO_STRING;
1099    }
1100    else if ( null != element )
1101    {
1102      if ( ( ElementKind.CLASS == element.getKind() || ElementKind.INTERFACE == element.getKind() ) &&
1103           isAssignableToKeyed( element ) )
1104      {
1105        return ImmutableInputKeyStrategy.KEYED;
1106      }
1107      else if ( ( ElementKind.CLASS == element.getKind() || ElementKind.INTERFACE == element.getKind() ) &&
1108                (
1109                  isAssignableToIdentifiable( element ) ||
1110                  AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.ACT_AS_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME ) ||
1111                  ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME ) &&
1112                    isIdRequired( (TypeElement) element ) )
1113                ) )
1114      {
1115        return ImmutableInputKeyStrategy.AREZ_IDENTIFIABLE;
1116      }
1117      else if ( ElementKind.ENUM == element.getKind() )
1118      {
1119        return ImmutableInputKeyStrategy.ENUM;
1120      }
1121    }
1122    return ImmutableInputKeyStrategy.DYNAMIC;
1123  }
1124
1125  private boolean isAssignableToKeyed( @Nonnull final Element element )
1126  {
1127    final TypeElement typeElement = processingEnv.getElementUtils().getTypeElement( Constants.KEYED_CLASSNAME );
1128    return processingEnv.getTypeUtils().isAssignable( element.asType(), typeElement.asType() );
1129  }
1130
1131  private boolean isAssignableToIdentifiable( @Nonnull final Element element )
1132  {
1133    final TypeElement typeElement = processingEnv.getElementUtils().getTypeElement( Constants.IDENTIFIABLE_CLASSNAME );
1134    final TypeMirror identifiableErasure = processingEnv.getTypeUtils().erasure( typeElement.asType() );
1135    return processingEnv.getTypeUtils().isAssignable( element.asType(), identifiableErasure );
1136  }
1137
1138  /**
1139   * The logic from this method has been cloned from Arez.
1140   * One day we should consider improving Arez so that this is not required somehow?
1141   */
1142  private boolean isIdRequired( @Nonnull final TypeElement element )
1143  {
1144    final VariableElement requireIdParameter = (VariableElement)
1145      AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME, "requireId" )
1146        .getValue();
1147    return !"DISABLE".equals( requireIdParameter.getSimpleName().toString() );
1148  }
1149
1150  @Nonnull
1151  private String deriveInputName( @Nonnull final Element element )
1152    throws ProcessorException
1153  {
1154    final String specifiedName =
1155      (String) AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "name" ).getValue();
1156
1157    final String name;
1158    if ( element instanceof ExecutableElement method )
1159    {
1160      name = getPropertyAccessorName( method, specifiedName );
1161    }
1162    else
1163    {
1164      name = isSentinelName( specifiedName ) ? element.getSimpleName().toString() : specifiedName;
1165    }
1166    if ( !SourceVersion.isIdentifier( name ) )
1167    {
1168      throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target specified an invalid name '" + specifiedName + "'. The " +
1169                                    "name must be a valid java identifier.", element );
1170    }
1171    else if ( SourceVersion.isKeyword( name ) )
1172    {
1173      throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target specified an invalid name '" + specifiedName + "'. The " +
1174                                    "name must not be a java keyword.", element );
1175    }
1176    else
1177    {
1178      return name;
1179    }
1180  }
1181
1182  private void validateInputNameAndType( @Nonnull final String name,
1183                                         @Nonnull final TypeMirror type,
1184                                         @Nonnull final Element element )
1185  {
1186    if ( "build".equals( name ) )
1187    {
1188      throw new ProcessorException( "@Input named 'build' is invalid as it conflicts with the method named " +
1189                                    "build() that is used in the generated Builder classes",
1190                                    element );
1191    }
1192    else if ( "child".equals( name ) &&
1193              ( type.getKind() != TypeKind.DECLARED && !"react4j.ReactNode".equals( type.toString() ) ) )
1194    {
1195      throw new ProcessorException( "@Input named 'child' should be of type react4j.ReactNode", element );
1196    }
1197    else if ( "children".equals( name ) &&
1198              ( type.getKind() != TypeKind.DECLARED && !"react4j.ReactNode[]".equals( type.toString() ) ) )
1199    {
1200      throw new ProcessorException( "@Input named 'children' should be of type react4j.ReactNode[]", element );
1201    }
1202  }
1203
1204  private void determineOnErrorMethod( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1205                                       @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1206                                       @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1207  {
1208    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1209    {
1210      if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( method, Constants.ON_ERROR_CLASSNAME ) )
1211      {
1212        MemberChecks.mustNotBeAbstract( Constants.ON_ERROR_CLASSNAME, method );
1213        MemberChecks.mustBeSubclassCallable( typeElement,
1214                                             Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1215                                             Constants.ON_ERROR_CLASSNAME,
1216                                             method );
1217        MemberChecks.mustNotReturnAnyValue( Constants.ON_ERROR_CLASSNAME, method );
1218        MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.ON_ERROR_CLASSNAME, method );
1219
1220        boolean infoFound = false;
1221        boolean errorFound = false;
1222        for ( final VariableElement parameter : method.getParameters() )
1223        {
1224          final TypeName typeName = TypeName.get( parameter.asType() );
1225          if ( typeName.toString().equals( Constants.ERROR_INFO_CLASSNAME ) )
1226          {
1227            if ( infoFound )
1228            {
1229              throw new ProcessorException( "@OnError target has multiple parameters of type " +
1230                                            Constants.ERROR_INFO_CLASSNAME,
1231                                            method );
1232            }
1233            infoFound = true;
1234          }
1235          else if ( typeName.toString().equals( Constants.JS_ERROR_CLASSNAME ) )
1236          {
1237            if ( errorFound )
1238            {
1239              throw new ProcessorException( "@OnError target has multiple parameters of type " +
1240                                            Constants.JS_ERROR_CLASSNAME,
1241                                            method );
1242            }
1243            errorFound = true;
1244          }
1245          else
1246          {
1247            throw new ProcessorException( "@OnError target has parameter of invalid type named " +
1248                                          parameter.getSimpleName(),
1249                                          parameter );
1250          }
1251        }
1252        descriptor.setOnError( method );
1253      }
1254    }
1255  }
1256
1257  private void determineScheduleRenderMethods( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1258                                               @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1259                                               @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1260  {
1261    final List<ScheduleRenderDescriptor> scheduleRenderDescriptors = new ArrayList<>();
1262    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1263    {
1264      final AnnotationMirror annotation =
1265        AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationByType( method, Constants.SCHEDULE_RENDER_CLASSNAME );
1266      if ( null != annotation )
1267      {
1268        MemberChecks.mustBeAbstract( Constants.SCHEDULE_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1269        MemberChecks.mustBeSubclassCallable( typeElement,
1270                                             Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1271                                             Constants.SCHEDULE_RENDER_CLASSNAME,
1272                                             method );
1273        MemberChecks.mustNotReturnAnyValue( Constants.SCHEDULE_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1274        MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.SCHEDULE_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1275
1276        final ViewType viewType = descriptor.getType();
1277        if ( ViewType.STATEFUL != viewType )
1278        {
1279          final String message =
1280            MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.SCHEDULE_RENDER_CLASSNAME,
1281                                  "be enclosed in a type if it is annotated by @View(type=" + viewType +
1282                                  "). The type must be STATEFUL" );
1283          throw new ProcessorException( message, method );
1284        }
1285
1286        final boolean skipShouldViewUpdate =
1287          AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValueValue( annotation, "skipShouldViewUpdate" );
1288
1289        scheduleRenderDescriptors.add( new ScheduleRenderDescriptor( method, skipShouldViewUpdate ) );
1290      }
1291    }
1292    descriptor.setScheduleRenderDescriptors( scheduleRenderDescriptors );
1293  }
1294
1295  private void determinePublishMethods( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1296                                        @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1297                                        @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1298  {
1299    final List<PublishDescriptor> descriptors = new ArrayList<>();
1300    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1301    {
1302      final AnnotationMirror annotation = AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationByType( method, Constants.PUBLISH_CLASSNAME );
1303      if ( null != annotation )
1304      {
1305        MemberChecks.mustBeSubclassCallable( typeElement,
1306                                             Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1307                                             Constants.PUBLISH_CLASSNAME,
1308                                             method );
1309        MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyParameters( Constants.PUBLISH_CLASSNAME, method );
1310        MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyTypeParameters( Constants.PUBLISH_CLASSNAME, method );
1311        MemberChecks.mustReturnAValue( Constants.PUBLISH_CLASSNAME, method );
1312        MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.PUBLISH_CLASSNAME, method );
1313
1314        final String qualifier = AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValueValue( annotation, "qualifier" );
1315        final ExecutableType methodType = resolveMethodType( descriptor, method );
1316
1317        if ( TypeKind.TYPEVAR == methodType.getReturnType().getKind() )
1318        {
1319          throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.PUBLISH_CLASSNAME, "return a type variable" ),
1320                                        method );
1321        }
1322
1323        descriptors.add( new PublishDescriptor( qualifier, method, methodType ) );
1324      }
1325    }
1326    descriptor.setPublishDescriptors( descriptors );
1327  }
1328
1329  private void determinePreRenderMethods( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1330                                          @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1331                                          @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1332  {
1333    final List<RenderHookDescriptor> descriptors = new ArrayList<>();
1334    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1335    {
1336      final AnnotationMirror annotation =
1337        AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationByType( method, Constants.PRE_RENDER_CLASSNAME );
1338      if ( null != annotation )
1339      {
1340        MemberChecks.mustBeSubclassCallable( typeElement,
1341                                             Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1342                                             Constants.PRE_RENDER_CLASSNAME,
1343                                             method );
1344        MemberChecks.mustNotBeAbstract( Constants.PRE_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1345        MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyParameters( Constants.PRE_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1346        MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyTypeParameters( Constants.PRE_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1347        MemberChecks.mustNotReturnAnyValue( Constants.PRE_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1348        MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.PRE_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1349
1350        final int sortOrder = AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValueValue( annotation, "sortOrder" );
1351        final ExecutableType methodType = resolveMethodType( descriptor, method );
1352
1353        descriptors.add( new RenderHookDescriptor( sortOrder, method, methodType ) );
1354      }
1355    }
1356    descriptors.sort( Comparator.comparingInt( RenderHookDescriptor::getSortOrder ) );
1357    descriptor.setPreRenderDescriptors( descriptors );
1358  }
1359
1360  private void determinePostRenderMethods( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1361                                           @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1362                                           @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1363  {
1364    final List<RenderHookDescriptor> descriptors = new ArrayList<>();
1365    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1366    {
1367      final AnnotationMirror annotation =
1368        AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationByType( method, Constants.POST_RENDER_CLASSNAME );
1369      if ( null != annotation )
1370      {
1371        MemberChecks.mustBeSubclassCallable( typeElement,
1372                                             Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1373                                             Constants.POST_RENDER_CLASSNAME,
1374                                             method );
1375        MemberChecks.mustNotBeAbstract( Constants.POST_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1376        MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyParameters( Constants.POST_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1377        MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyTypeParameters( Constants.POST_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1378        MemberChecks.mustNotReturnAnyValue( Constants.POST_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1379        MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.POST_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1380
1381        final int sortOrder = AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValueValue( annotation, "sortOrder" );
1382        final ExecutableType methodType = resolveMethodType( descriptor, method );
1383
1384        descriptors.add( new RenderHookDescriptor( sortOrder, method, methodType ) );
1385      }
1386    }
1387    descriptors.sort( Comparator.comparingInt( RenderHookDescriptor::getSortOrder ) );
1388    descriptor.setPostRenderDescriptors( descriptors );
1389  }
1390
1391  private void determineRenderMethod( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1392                                      @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1393                                      @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1394  {
1395    boolean foundRender = false;
1396    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1397    {
1398      final AnnotationMirror annotation =
1399        AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationByType( method, Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME );
1400      if ( null != annotation )
1401      {
1402        MemberChecks.mustNotBeAbstract( Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1403        MemberChecks.mustBeSubclassCallable( typeElement,
1404                                             Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1405                                             Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME,
1406                                             method );
1407        MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyParameters( Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1408        MemberChecks.mustReturnAnInstanceOf( processingEnv,
1409                                             method,
1410                                             Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME,
1411                                             Constants.VNODE_CLASSNAME );
1412        MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1413        MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyTypeParameters( Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1414        if ( !method.getReturnType().getKind().isPrimitive() &&
1415             !AnnotationsUtil.hasNonnullAnnotation( method ) &&
1416             !AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( method ) &&
1417             ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( method,
1418                                                  Constants.WARNING_MISSING_RENDER_NULLABILITY,
1419                                                  Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) )
1420        {
1421          final String message =
1422            MemberChecks.should( Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME,
1423                                 "be annotated by a @Nonnull or a @Nullable annotation. " +
1424                                 MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_MISSING_RENDER_NULLABILITY,
1425                                                            Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) );
1426          processingEnv.getMessager().printMessage( Diagnostic.Kind.WARNING, message, method );
1427        }
1428
1429        descriptor.setRender( method );
1430        foundRender = true;
1431      }
1432    }
1433    final boolean requireRender = descriptor.requireRender();
1434    if ( requireRender && !foundRender )
1435    {
1436      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1437                                                       "contain a method annotated with the " +
1438                                                       MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME ) +
1439                                                       " annotation or must specify type=NO_RENDER" ),
1440                                    typeElement );
1441    }
1442    else if ( !requireRender )
1443    {
1444      if ( foundRender )
1445      {
1446        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1447                                                            "contain a method annotated with the " +
1448                                                            MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME ) +
1449                                                            " annotation or must not specify type=NO_RENDER" ),
1450                                      typeElement );
1451      }
1452      else if ( !descriptor.hasConstructor() &&
1453                !descriptor.hasPostConstruct() &&
1454                null == descriptor.getPostMount() &&
1455                null == descriptor.getPostRender() &&
1456                null == descriptor.getPreUpdate() &&
1457                null == descriptor.getPostUpdate() &&
1458                descriptor.getPreRenderDescriptors().isEmpty() &&
1459                descriptor.getPostRenderDescriptors().isEmpty() &&
1460                !descriptor.hasPreUpdateOnInputChange() &&
1461                !descriptor.hasPostUpdateOnInputChange() )
1462      {
1463        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1464                                                         "contain lifecycle methods if the the @View(type=NO_RENDER) parameter is specified" ),
1465                                      typeElement );
1466      }
1467    }
1468  }
1469
1470  private void determinePostMountMethod( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1471                                         @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1472                                         @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1473  {
1474    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1475    {
1476      if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( method, Constants.POST_MOUNT_CLASSNAME ) )
1477      {
1478        MemberChecks.mustBeLifecycleHook( typeElement,
1479                                          Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1480                                          Constants.POST_MOUNT_CLASSNAME,
1481                                          method );
1482        descriptor.setPostMount( method );
1483      }
1484    }
1485  }
1486
1487  private void determinePostMountOrUpdateMethod( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1488                                                 @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1489                                                 @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1490  {
1491    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1492    {
1493      if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( method, Constants.POST_MOUNT_OR_UPDATE_CLASSNAME ) )
1494      {
1495        MemberChecks.mustBeLifecycleHook( typeElement,
1496                                          Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1497                                          Constants.POST_MOUNT_OR_UPDATE_CLASSNAME,
1498                                          method );
1499        descriptor.setPostRender( method );
1500      }
1501    }
1502  }
1503
1504  private void determinePostUpdateMethod( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1505                                          @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1506                                          @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1507  {
1508    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1509    {
1510      if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( method, Constants.POST_UPDATE_CLASSNAME ) )
1511      {
1512        MemberChecks.mustBeLifecycleHook( typeElement,
1513                                          Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1514                                          Constants.POST_UPDATE_CLASSNAME,
1515                                          method );
1516        descriptor.setPostUpdate( method );
1517      }
1518    }
1519  }
1520
1521  private void determinePreUpdateMethod( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1522                                         @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1523                                         @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1524  {
1525    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1526    {
1527      if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( method, Constants.PRE_UPDATE_CLASSNAME ) )
1528      {
1529        MemberChecks.mustBeLifecycleHook( typeElement,
1530                                          Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1531                                          Constants.PRE_UPDATE_CLASSNAME,
1532                                          method );
1533        descriptor.setPreUpdate( method );
1534      }
1535    }
1536  }
1537
1538  private ExecutableType resolveMethodType( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1539                                            @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method )
1540  {
1541    return (ExecutableType) processingEnv.getTypeUtils().asMemberOf( descriptor.getDeclaredType(), method );
1542  }
1543
1544  @Nonnull
1545  private String deriveViewName( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement )
1546  {
1547    final String name =
1548      (String) AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( typeElement, Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME, "name" )
1549        .getValue();
1550
1551    if ( isSentinelName( name ) )
1552    {
1553      return typeElement.getSimpleName().toString();
1554    }
1555    else
1556    {
1557      if ( !SourceVersion.isIdentifier( name ) )
1558      {
1559        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME ) +
1560                                      " target specified an invalid name '" + name + "'. The " +
1561                                      "name must be a valid java identifier.", typeElement );
1562      }
1563      else if ( SourceVersion.isKeyword( name ) )
1564      {
1565        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME ) +
1566                                      " target specified an invalid name '" + name + "'. The " +
1567                                      "name must not be a java keyword.", typeElement );
1568      }
1569      return name;
1570    }
1571  }
1572
1573  private void determineViewCapabilities( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1574                                          @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement )
1575  {
1576    if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( typeElement, Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME ) )
1577    {
1578      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1579                                                          "be annotated with the " +
1580                                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME ) +
1581                                                          " as React4j will add the annotation." ),
1582                                    typeElement );
1583    }
1584
1585    if ( descriptor.needsInjection() && !descriptor.getDeclaredType().getTypeArguments().isEmpty() )
1586    {
1587      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME ) +
1588                                    " target has enabled injection integration but the class " +
1589                                    "has type arguments which is incompatible with injection integration.",
1590                                    typeElement );
1591    }
1592  }
1593
1594  @Nonnull
1595  private ViewType extractViewType( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement )
1596  {
1597    final VariableElement declaredTypeEnum = (VariableElement)
1598      AnnotationsUtil
1599        .getAnnotationValue( typeElement, Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME, "type" )
1600        .getValue();
1601    return ViewType.valueOf( declaredTypeEnum.getSimpleName().toString() );
1602  }
1603
1604  private boolean isInputObservable( @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods,
1605                                     @Nonnull final Element element,
1606                                     final boolean immutable )
1607  {
1608    final VariableElement parameter = (VariableElement)
1609      AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "observable" ).getValue();
1610    return switch ( parameter.getSimpleName().toString() )
1611    {
1612      case "ENABLE" ->
1613      {
1614        if ( immutable )
1615        {
1616          throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target has specified both immutable=true and " +
1617                                        "observable=ENABLE which is an invalid combination.",
1618                                        element );
1619        }
1620        yield true;
1621      }
1622      case "DISABLE" -> false;
1623      default -> hasAnyArezObserverMethods( methods );
1624    };
1625  }
1626
