1627  private boolean hasAnyArezObserverMethods( @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1628  {
1629    return
1630      methods
1631        .stream()
1632        .anyMatch( m -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( m, Constants.MEMOIZE_CLASSNAME ) ||
1633                        ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( m, Constants.OBSERVE_CLASSNAME ) &&
1634                          ( !m.getParameters().isEmpty() || !m.getSimpleName().toString().equals( "trackRender" ) ) ) );
1635  }
1636
1637  private boolean isInputImmutable( @Nonnull final Element element )
1638  {
1639    return (Boolean) AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "immutable" )
1640      .getValue();
1641  }
1642
1643  private boolean isInputDependency( @Nonnull final Element element,
1644                                     final boolean immutable,
1645                                     final boolean disposable )
1646  {
1647    final VariableElement parameter = (VariableElement)
1648      AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "dependency" ).getValue();
1649    return switch ( parameter.getSimpleName().toString() )
1650    {
1651      case "ENABLE" ->
1652      {
1653        if ( !immutable )
1654        {
1655          throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target must be immutable if dependency=ENABLE is specified",
1656                                        element );
1657        }
1658        else if ( !disposable )
1659        {
1660          throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target must be disposable if dependency=ENABLE is specified",
1661                                        element );
1662        }
1663        yield true;
1664      }
1665      case "DISABLE" -> false;
1666      default -> immutable && disposable;
1667    };
1668  }
1669
1670  private boolean isInputDisposable( @Nonnull final Element element, @Nonnull final Element inputType )
1671  {
1672    final VariableElement parameter = (VariableElement)
1673      AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "disposable" ).getValue();
1674    return switch ( parameter.getSimpleName().toString() )
1675    {
1676      case "ENABLE" -> true;
1677      case "DISABLE" -> false;
1678      default -> (
1679                   ElementKind.CLASS == inputType.getKind() &&
1680                   AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( inputType, Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME )
1681                 ) ||
1682                 (
1683                   ( ElementKind.CLASS == inputType.getKind() || ElementKind.INTERFACE == inputType.getKind() ) &&
1684                   AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( inputType, Constants.ACT_AS_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME )
1685                 );
1686    };
1687  }
1688
1689  @Nonnull
1690  private ObserveOnRenderConfig resolveObserveOnRender( @Nonnull final Element element,
1691                                                        @Nonnull final TypeMirror returnType,
1692                                                        @Nullable final Element inputType )
1693  {
1694    final VariableElement parameter = (VariableElement)
1695      AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "observeOnRender" ).getValue();
1696    final String value = parameter.getSimpleName().toString();
1697    if ( "DISABLE".equals( value ) )
1698    {
1699      return new ObserveOnRenderConfig( false, false );
1700    }
1701    else
1702    {
1703      final boolean assignableToComponentObservable = isAssignableToComponentObservable( returnType );
1704      final ArezComponentObservableResolution arezObservableResolution =
1705        inputType instanceof TypeElement ?
1706        resolveArezComponentObservable( (TypeElement) inputType ) :
1707        ArezComponentObservableResolution.NOT_AREZ_COMPONENT;
1708
1709      if ( "ENABLE".equals( value ) )
1710      {
1711        if ( ArezComponentObservableResolution.DISABLED == arezObservableResolution )
1712        {
1713          throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target has specified observeOnRender=ENABLE but the return type " +
1714                                        "is annotated with @ArezComponent and resolves observable=DISABLE.",
1715                                        element );
1716        }
1717        else if ( assignableToComponentObservable )
1718        {
1719          return new ObserveOnRenderConfig( true, false );
1720        }
1721        else if ( null == inputType || !canTypeUseRuntimeComponentObservableCheck( inputType ) )
1722        {
1723          throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target has specified observeOnRender=ENABLE but the return type " +
1724                                        "can never implement arez.component.ComponentObservable.",
1725                                        element );
1726        }
1727        else if ( isFinalClass( inputType ) )
1728        {
1729          throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target has specified observeOnRender=ENABLE but the return type " +
1730                                        "is a final class that does not implement arez.component.ComponentObservable.",
1731                                        element );
1732        }
1733        else
1734        {
1735          return new ObserveOnRenderConfig( true, true );
1736        }
1737      }
1738      else
1739      {
1740        assert "AUTODETECT".equals( value );
1741
1742        if ( assignableToComponentObservable )
1743        {
1744          return new ObserveOnRenderConfig( true, false );
1745        }
1746        else if ( ArezComponentObservableResolution.ENABLED == arezObservableResolution )
1747        {
1748          return new ObserveOnRenderConfig( true, false );
1749        }
1750        else if ( isActAsComponentType( inputType ) )
1751        {
1752          return new ObserveOnRenderConfig( true, true );
1753        }
1754        else
1755        {
1756          return new ObserveOnRenderConfig( false, false );
1757        }
1758      }
1759    }
1760  }
1761
1762  private boolean canTypeUseRuntimeComponentObservableCheck( @Nonnull final Element inputType )
1763  {
1764    return ElementKind.CLASS == inputType.getKind() || ElementKind.INTERFACE == inputType.getKind();
1765  }
1766
1767  private boolean isFinalClass( @Nonnull final Element inputType )
1768  {
1769    return ElementKind.CLASS == inputType.getKind() && inputType.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.FINAL );
1770  }
1771
1772  private boolean isAssignableToComponentObservable( @Nonnull final TypeMirror type )
1773  {
1774    final TypeElement typeElement =
1775      processingEnv.getElementUtils().getTypeElement( Constants.COMPONENT_OBSERVABLE_CLASSNAME );
1776    return null != typeElement && processingEnv.getTypeUtils().isAssignable( type, typeElement.asType() );
1777  }
1778
1779  private boolean isActAsComponentType( @Nullable final Element inputType )
1780  {
1781    return null != inputType &&
1782           ( ElementKind.CLASS == inputType.getKind() || ElementKind.INTERFACE == inputType.getKind() ) &&
1783           AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( inputType, Constants.ACT_AS_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME );
1784  }
1785
1786  @Nonnull
1787  private ArezComponentObservableResolution resolveArezComponentObservable( @Nonnull final TypeElement element )
1788  {
1789    if ( !AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME ) )
1790    {
1791      return ArezComponentObservableResolution.NOT_AREZ_COMPONENT;
1792    }
1793
1794    final VariableElement observableParameter = (VariableElement)
1795      AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME, "observable" ).getValue();
1796    return switch ( observableParameter.getSimpleName().toString() )
1797    {
1798      case "ENABLE" -> ArezComponentObservableResolution.ENABLED;
1799      case "DISABLE" -> ArezComponentObservableResolution.DISABLED;
1800      default ->
1801      {
1802        final boolean disposeOnDeactivate = (Boolean)
1803          AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME, "disposeOnDeactivate" )
1804            .getValue();
1805        yield disposeOnDeactivate ?
1806              ArezComponentObservableResolution.ENABLED :
1807              ArezComponentObservableResolution.DISABLED;
1808      }
1809    };
1810  }
1811
1812  private enum ArezComponentObservableResolution
1813  {
1814    ENABLED,
1815    DISABLED,
1816    NOT_AREZ_COMPONENT
1817  }
1818
1819  private boolean isContextInput( @Nonnull final Element element )
1820  {
1821    final VariableElement parameter = (VariableElement)
1822      AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "source" ).getValue();
1823    return "CONTEXT".equals( parameter.getSimpleName().toString() );
1824  }
1825
1826  private boolean shouldSetDefaultPriority( @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1827  {
1828    return
1829      methods
1830        .stream()
1831        .filter( method -> !method.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.PRIVATE ) )
1832        .anyMatch( method -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( method, Constants.MEMOIZE_CLASSNAME ) ||
1833                             AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( method, Constants.OBSERVE_CLASSNAME ) );
1834  }
1835
1836  private void verifyNoDuplicateAnnotations( @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method )
1837    throws ProcessorException
1838  {
1839    final List<String> annotations =
1840      Arrays.asList( Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME,
1841                     Constants.INPUT_VALIDATE_CLASSNAME,
1842                     Constants.ON_INPUT_CHANGE_CLASSNAME,
1843                     Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME );
1844    MemberChecks.verifyNoOverlappingAnnotations( method, annotations, Collections.emptyMap() );
1845  }
1846
1847  private boolean isSentinelName( @Nonnull final String name )
1848  {
1849    return SENTINEL_NAME.equals( name );
1850  }
1851
1852  @Nonnull
1853  private String getPropertyAccessorName( @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method,
1854                                          @Nonnull final String specifiedName )
1855    throws ProcessorException
1856  {
1857    String name = deriveName( method, GETTER_PATTERN, specifiedName );
1858    if ( null != name )
1859    {
1860      return name;
1861    }
1862    else if ( method.getReturnType().getKind() == TypeKind.BOOLEAN )
1863    {
1864      name = deriveName( method, ISSER_PATTERN, specifiedName );
1865      if ( null != name )
1866      {
1867        return name;
1868      }
1869    }
1870    return method.getSimpleName().toString();
1871  }
1872
1873  @Nullable
1874  private String deriveName( @Nonnull final Element method, @Nonnull final Pattern pattern, @Nonnull final String name )
1875    throws ProcessorException
1876  {
1877    if ( isSentinelName( name ) )
1878    {
1879      final String methodName = method.getSimpleName().toString();
1880      final Matcher matcher = pattern.matcher( methodName );
1881      if ( matcher.find() )
1882      {
1883        final String candidate = matcher.group( 1 );
1884        return Character.toLowerCase( candidate.charAt( 0 ) ) + candidate.substring( 1 );
1885      }
1886      else
1887      {
1888        return null;
1889      }
1890    }
1891    else
1892    {
1893      return name;
1894    }
1895  }
1896}
